summary.intent: Create a formal story artifact for the AI Metrics Dashboard page (story 5-2) using the BMad methodology, then prepare it for implementation.
summary.outcome: Story 5-2 (`5-2-ai-metrics-dashboard-page.md`) was successfully created with 32 acceptance criteria, 8 tasks, and detailed implementation guidance; sprint-status.yaml was updated to mark it as ready-for-dev.

repo: Sprint story files live in `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/` with naming pattern `{epic}-{story}-{slug}.md`
Sprint status is tracked in `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/sprint-status.yaml` with story keys and statuses like backlog/ready-for-dev
Planning artifacts (epics, architecture, UX spec, PRD) are in `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/`
The project uses Astro with Chart.js and lightweight-charts v5 for visualization
Cache loading uses `fs.readFileSync` pattern compatible with both dev and build modes
Data attribute pattern is used to pass Astro build-time data to client-side chart scripts
lightweight-charts v5 requires Unix timestamp conversion for static data

code.finding: Story created with 32 ACs covering FR9–FR33, 8 implementation tasks, 6 data utility function signatures, and per-metric clarifications (e.g., metric 8 uses turns.length, metric 13 is checkpoint-level scatter, metric 18 uses Chart.js scatter not lightweight-charts)
Shared TypeScript types for the scripts layer, referenced during story research
Theme constants module used for Chart.js dark theme options
Existing chart card component pattern to follow for new dashboard section components

workflow: BMad `/bmad-dev-story` skill checks sprint-status.yaml for ready-for-dev stories before proceeding; stories must be formally created before implementation begins
BMad `/bmad-create-story` skill loads planning artifacts, scans codebase, and researches tech specifics in parallel before generating the story
The recommended workflow is: create-story → dev-story → code-review, with code-review ideally run on a different LLM than the one that implemented
The Phase 2 Delta PRD (`prd-ai-metrics-dashboard.md`) is a planning artifact, not a story file — these are distinct artifact types in this workflow

friction: Initial `/bmad-dev-story` invocation had no ready-for-dev story and no story file for 5-2, requiring a detour to create it first before implementation could begin
open_items: Story 5-2 implementation not yet started — next step is running `/bmad-dev-story`
Code review pending after implementation, ideally using a different LLM
Deferred work items tracked in `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/deferred-work.md` were updated during story creation but not fully addressed
